headlines.title: Airlines cut 13,000 flights in May as jet fuel prices soar
headlines.description: Airlines have removed nearly two million seats from flights over the month, data from Cirium shows.

headlines.title: BBC traces how 10 minutes of Israeli bombing brought devastation to Lebanon
headlines.description: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.

headlines.title: Watch: The Lebanese neighbourhoods shattered by Israel's ten minute bombing raid
headlines.description: The BBC’s Nawal Al-Maghafi has been piecing together what happened on 8 April 2026, after one of the deadliest chapters in the country’s recent history.

headlines.title: Catherine to return to overseas visits with Italy trip
headlines.description: The Princess of Wales will go to Italy next week on her first official overseas engagement for more than three years.

headlines.title: Campaigning sprint finish ahead of elections around Britain tomorrow
headlines.description: A mesmerising mix of results are expected after candidates make their final pitches, our political editor writes.

headlines.title: Met forms team after attacks on Jewish community
headlines.description: The move comes after a series of arson attacks at Jewish sites, as well as a double stabbing.

headlines.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me,' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
headlines.description: OpenAI president Greg Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.

headlines.title: The league is the dream - but is this Arsenal's moment in Europe?
headlines.description: All the talk has been about Arsenal's Premier League title challenge - but is this now the Gunners' time to conquer Europe?

headlines.title: Former council leader jailed for sexually assaulting young men
headlines.description: Jordan Linden stood down as leader of North Lanarkshire Council in 2022 after the allegations emerged.

headlines.title: Next to hike prices by up to 8% outside Europe due to Iran war costs
headlines.description: No extra price rises are slated for the UK, which saw better than expected sales in the first quarter.

headlines.title: Dressed for succession: What Kim Ju Ae's outfits tell us about North Korea
headlines.description: Kim Ju Ae's evolving fashion is one of the signs that she is being groomed as North Korea's next leader.

headlines.title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board stranded ship after hantavirus outbreak
headlines.description: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

headlines.title: Spanish superstar Rosalía reaches for heaven as her tour hits London
headlines.description: The Spanish star delights fans as she brings her highly anticipated Lux tour to the UK.

headlines.title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
headlines.description: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.

headlines.title: What is Trump's 'Project Freedom' in the Strait of Hormuz?
headlines.description: The US president said the operation has been paused after starting on Monday.

headlines.title: Watch: How Heidi Klum became a living Met Gala sculpture
headlines.description: Prosthetic make-up designer Mike Marino reveals how he created the supermodel's show-stopping costume for the annual event in New York.

headlines.title: Finding soldier Tom: Solving family mystery of WW2 Soviet prisoner of war
headlines.description: He was saved by a Jersey family after escaping a Nazi labour camp, but after the war he disappeared in the Soviet Union.

headlines.title: Oil prices ease as US pauses Project Freedom to seek deal with Iran
headlines.description: President Donald Trump raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.

headlines.title: Bryson DeChambeau to focus on YouTube if LIV Golf fails
headlines.description: Bryson DeChambeau says he will focus on growing his YouTube channel and only "play tournaments that want me" if LIV Golf does not survive.

headlines.title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
headlines.description: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

headlines.title: UK government discusses hosting Olympics in 2040s
headlines.description: The UK government says it is in "discussions about supporting potential bids" to host the Olympics and Paralympics in the 2040s.

headlines.title: Four-acre traveller site 'illegally built at weekend'
headlines.description: Residents describe how a field in their village was rapidly concreted over within four days.

headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Is the US-Iran War Restarting?
headlines.description: Is the US-Iran ceasefire under threat after repeat attacks in Strait of Hormuz?

headlines.title: Who could lead the Democrats into 2028?
headlines.description: The Americast team answer your questions live on stage!

headlines.title: Smaller balls for women's rugby 'worst decision ever'
headlines.description: England fly-half Zoe Harrison says the introduction of smaller balls for this autumn's WXV Global Series is "the worst decision someone has ever made".

headlines.description: Bryson DeChambeau says he will focus on growing his YouTube channel and only "play tournaments that want me" if LIV Golf does not survive.

headlines.title: Where do Bayern's prolific trio rank in greatest front threes ever?
headlines.description: Bayern Munich's attack of Harry Kane, Luis Diaz and Michael Olise has hit 100 goals this season. With the second leg of the Champions League semi-final with PSG coming up, BBC Sport compares the two front threes.

headlines.title: Chelsea owners face moment of reckoning amid fan backlash
headlines.description: The moment of reckoning has arrived for Chelsea's BlueCo ownership, which is now the target of an increasingly angry fanbase.

headlines.title: The league is the dream - but is this Arsenal's moment in Europe?
headlines.description: All the talk has been about Arsenal's Premier League title challenge - but is this now the Gunners' time to conquer Europe?
